hypothesis.strategy: Add 4-5 new 2026 papers to each of the 3 lowest-scoring articles, targeting sourcing and currency dimensions
hypothesis.reasoning: Past experiments show adding 2026 papers with footnotes is the most reliable strategy (+3-14 points). e-commerce-applications (sourcing=52) and test-time-compute-scaling (sourcing=56) have the most room for improvement in sourcing. wiki-quality-benchmarking (currency=57) needs more recent papers.

result.lesson: All 3 articles gained 6-9 points. wiki-quality-benchmarking gained most (+9.3) due to currency jumping from 57 to 87. Adding 2026 papers with diagrams consistently delivers strong improvements across sourcing, currency, and depth.
